justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent initially interpreted "March 3rd" as March 3rd, 2027, which was incorrect given the current date of June 7th, 2026, but then correctly understood subsequent date requests.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without proactively offering alternative slots when the requested time was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls that returned no results before finding an available slot, leading to several unproductive turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The conversation felt a bit tiring due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest alternative times, requiring the user to repeatedly propose new dates and times.
